reason: This is a religious poem encouraging prayer during sleepless nights, using traditional Arabic poetic form. It contains no extremist content or violent themes.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: إذا امْتَنَعَ النومُ عن مُقْلَتِكْ وأَلْهَبَكَ الهاجسُ الـمُسْتَعِرْ فَقُمْ وتَوَجَّهْ إلى قِبْلَتِكْ ونَاجِ إلـهَكَ ثمّ انْتَظِرْ
